# zstack_lb_server_group (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage Load Balancer Server Groups in ZStack. A Load Balancer Server Group is a collection of backend servers for a load balancer.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `load_balancer_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Load Balancer.
- `name` (String) The name of the Load Balancer Server Group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the Load Balancer Server Group.
- `ip_version` (Number) The IP version (4 for IPv4, 6 for IPv6).

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Load Balancer Server Group.
